title: Hunan Rigatoni Bake
description: A spicy and comforting pasta bake with the flavors of Hunan cuisine.
instructions: Cook rigatoni according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add Hunan sauce and stir to combine.
Add cooked rigatoni to the skillet and toss to coat with sauce.
Transfer rigatoni mixture to a baking dish and top with additional butter if desired.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until top is lightly browned.
